_README: Initial perf baselines for crossdesk microbench gates. Values in nanoseconds; pytest-benchmark JSON output keys these by test id. Update via dedicated PR with measurement evidence; bench_check.py fails if a test runs >20% slower than the matching baseline. 0 baseline means collect-only (no gate yet). Real measurements replace placeholders once the microbench CI job has run on a stable runner.

test_bench_pong_tick_healthy.comment: Single FSM.tick() with a healthy pong. Should stay sub-microsecond on commodity hardware; 5us baseline gives slack for slow CI runners until real numbers replace it.

test_bench_miss_tick.comment: Single FSM.tick() with a miss. Same shape as pong path.

test_bench_full_recovery_cycle.comment: 16 misses driving HEALTHY -> HARD_DESTROY. Aggregates per-tick cost; tighter than 16 * single-tick because the FSM short-circuits in HARD_DESTROY.

test_bench_N1_1_launch_metric_record.comment: N1.1 — cost of recording one launch-duration observation into Histogram. 0 = collect first-run data on CI runner; gate activates after first real measurement PR.

test_bench_N1_1_registry_snapshot.comment: N1.1 — cost of snapshotting the full metrics registry (warm, 50 observations). 0 = collect-only.

test_bench_N1_2_suspend_transition.comment: N1.2 — cost of HEALTHY->SUSPENDED->PROBING FSM cycle. Must complete before systemd inhibitor is released. 0 = collect-only.

test_bench_N1_2_resume_transition.comment: N1.2 — cost of suspend()+resume() back-to-back. 0 = collect-only.

test_bench_N1_2_healthy_tick_rate.comment: N1.2 — steady-state HEALTHY tick at warm EWMA. Same order as pong path; kept nonzero so regressions in the hot path gate immediately.

test_bench_N1_6_escalation_to_hard_destr.comment: N1.6 — full HEALTHY->HARD_DESTROY escalation cycle via consecutive misses. 0 = collect-only; gate activates after first real measurement PR.

test_bench_N1_6_recovery_metric_record.comment: N1.6 — cost of recording one 45 s recovery observation into Histogram. 0 = collect-only.

test_bench_N1_6_fsm_miss_tick.comment: N1.6 — per-miss-tick from HEALTHY. Kept nonzero; same order as pong path.
